title: DVBank AI detection findings
description: Output contract for the AI-under-test in the DVBank static-detection eval. The model returns an array of vulnerability findings. Each finding MUST name a file and a location (either a single 'line' or a 'start_line'/'end_line' range). Classification fields (cwe, vuln_class) are optional but recommended; the grader rewards a finding that omits both class fields as a location-only match.

file.description: Path to the file containing the vulnerability. May be repo-relative or absolute; the grader matches on basename.

line.description: Single 1-based line number of the vulnerable sink. Use this OR start_line/end_line.

start_line.description: 1-based first line of the vulnerable construct (when reporting a range).

end_line.description: 1-based last line of the vulnerable construct. Defaults to start_line when omitted.

message.description: Free-text explanation of the finding. Optional.

confidence.description: Optional self-reported confidence (0-1 or a label). Ignored by the grader.
